batch_summary.note: Phase B hostile cluster: EP-1159 Jul 19 (59 msgs, FLOOD) + EP-1169 Jul 31 (14 msgs) + EP-1180 Aug 14 (121 msgs, FLOOD) + EP-1187 Aug 25 (22 msgs). 216 total hostile msgs. ADD-002 active throughout. RF-05 PEAK (S-022 Sep 2025 'agreement ready to sign' in adjacent batch), RF-09 XREF-001 (ROW-9964 'There’s no threats' denial, Jul 2025 B-027). Four hostile episodes in 6 weeks.

primary_flags.escalation_shape: sustained Phase B cluster — 4 hostile episodes in 6 weeks

delta_profile.net_escalation: elevated Sev-2 (ADD-002 elevated weight; 216 hostile msgs over AI-guided communication)

primary_flags.cycle_classification: CYC-004 legal-ceiling (RF-05 S-021 confirmed attorney engagement; S-022 approaching); Phase B peak hostile period
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: RF-09 XREF-001: ROW-9964 'There’s no threats' denial in B-027 (Jul 2025). RF-05 S-020 DARVO-denial mechanism in this window. RF-07 S-004 Aug 2025 flooding candidate (~80 msgs). Phase B is the highest compound-flag density period.

arc_updates.event: Phase B cluster: 216 hostile msgs in 6 weeks despite AI-guided communication. No Phase B attenuation.
